# Easy Day Notary

> Easy Day Notary is a licensed Florida Notary Public providing mobile
> notary and Remote Online Notarization (RON) services throughout Florida,
> including loan signing agent services for real estate closings.

Easy Day Notary helps individuals, real estate professionals, and title
companies get documents notarized in person or online, with flexible
scheduling including evenings and weekends.

## Company

- [About Easy Day Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/about): Background, mission, and values.
- [Contact](https://easydaynotary.com/contact): Phone, email, hours, and service area.
- [Schedule an Appointment](https://easydaynotary.com/schedule): Book a mobile visit or Remote Online Notary session.

## Services

- [All Services](https://easydaynotary.com/services): Overview of every notary service offered.
- [Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/mobile-notary): In-person notarization at the client's location.
- [Remote Online Notary (RON)](https://easydaynotary.com/remote-online-notary): Live video notarization available statewide in Florida.
- [Loan Signings](https://easydaynotary.com/loan-signings): Loan signing agent services for purchase, refinance, and HELOC closings.
- [Apostille Services](https://easydaynotary.com/apostille-services): Coming soon.

## Guides

- [The Complete Guide to Remote Online Notary Services in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/remote-online-notary-guide-florida): How RON works, Florida law, and getting started with BlueNotary.
- [What Is a Remote Online Notary (RON)?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-is-remote-online-notary): A plain-English explainer on RON vs. traditional notarization.
- [Step-by-Step Guide to Online Notarization](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/step-by-step-online-notarization-guide): A detailed walkthrough of a RON session from booking to delivery.
- [How Long Is an Online Notarization Valid?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/how-long-is-online-notarization-valid): Whether RON notarizations expire and how record retention works.
- [Electronic Notary vs Notary Public: What's the Difference?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/electronic-notary-vs-notary-public): Clarifying eNotary, RON, and traditional notary terminology.
- [Can Documents Be Notarized Over Zoom?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/can-documents-be-notarized-over-zoom): Why RON requires purpose-built platforms, not general video calls.
- [Need an Online Notary Today? Here's What to Do](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/need-online-notary-today): A same-day RON checklist.
- [Is Online Notarization Safe?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/is-online-notarization-safe): The security and identity verification behind RON sessions.
- [Documents You Can Notarize Online](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/documents-you-can-notarize-online): Which documents work for RON and which typically don't.
- [Can You Use an Online Notary Across State Lines?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/online-notary-across-state-lines): How interstate RON recognition works.
- [Florida Mobile Notary Pricing Explained](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/florida-mobile-notary-pricing): Travel fee and notarial fee breakdown for mobile appointments.

- [Can a Notary Come to My House?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/can-a-notary-come-to-my-house): How mobile notary home visits work.
- [Can You Find a Notary at the Airport?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/notary-at-the-airport): Why airport notaries are rare, and better alternatives for travelers.
- [Weekend & After-Hours Mobile Notary Appointments](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/weekend-after-hours-mobile-notary): Evening and weekend mobile notary scheduling.

- [When Can a Florida Notary Refuse Service?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/when-can-a-notary-refuse-service): The specific legal reasons a notary must decline.
